trending_videos.title: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Amazing Guardians Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
trending_videos.description:
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marvel-tokon-fighting-souls/

Heroes from a new generation, the Amazing Guardians are the second team to be revealed for MARVEL Tōkon: Fighting Souls!

Led by Spider-Man and featuring Ms. Marvel and Star-Lord, this team also introduces a brand-new character: Peni Parker, a brilliant and eccentric young scientist who pilots the powerful SP//dr mech suit and takes on enemies.

Coming to PS5 and PC on August 6th, 2026 PT!
 
© 2026 MARVEL 
©2026 Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc. 
Developed by ARC SYSTEM WORKS CO., LTD.

#ps5 #ps5games #pc #pcgames #marveltokon #xmen

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Tennessee vs. Virginia
trending_videos.description: Midwest Region round two gets underway as the Volunteers face the Cavaliers at Xfinity Mobile Arena. The two programs face off after a hard-fought battle in the first round. They enter this contest with one purpose, to qualify for the next round.

trending_videos.title: Goodyear 400
trending_videos.description: Professional racing's top stars compete for the checkered flag in the annual Goodyear 400. This matchup features tactical pit strategy and high-speed maneuvers on a historic track. A win here cements a driver's legacy at a premier racing venue.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: High Point vs. Arkansas
trending_videos.description: No.12 High Point travels to take on the No.4 Arkansas in this NCAA Tournament at the Moda Center. Panthers guard Rob Martin leads an athletic unit against a Razorbacks squad that averages 89.9 points. Winners of this matchup advance to the Sweet 16.

trending_videos.title: Valspar Championship, Final Round
trending_videos.description: From Innisbrook Resort Copperhead Course in Palm Harbor, Fla.

trending_videos.title: Second Round: Michigan State vs. Oklahoma
trending_videos.description: This Regional 4 Sacramento second round battle brings the Michigan State Spartans and Oklahoma Sooners to the Lloyd Noble Center. Michigan State advanced by beating CSU 65-62, while Oklahoma routed Idaho 89-59. Both squads seek a win to advance.

trending_videos.title: Slam Dunk Sunday 2026
trending_videos.description: The all new matches, more stories and more action, featuring the world-class All Elite Wrestling roster.

trending_videos.title: One Nation With Brian Kilmeade
trending_videos.description: In-depth analysis of the issues and stories that matter most to Americans while offering context and solutions to help bring the country together.

trending_videos.title: The Final Icon Is Revealed
trending_videos.description: In the final first-round battles, Fieri welcomes TOC VI semifinalist Lee Anne Wong to face off against Iron Chef Stephanie Izard. In the last battle of the round, the fourth mystery culinary icon is revealed to take on qualifier winner Kenny Gilbert.

sports_and_esports.description: A significant portion of the trending videos are related to sports events and esports.
examples: Second Round: High Point vs. Arkansas
Second Round: Michigan State vs. Oklahoma
sports_and_esports.insight: Sports content, especially involving competitive events and highlights, is a dominant trend. Channels focusing on live sports coverage or sports analysis have a high potential for engagement.

gaming.description: Gaming content is prominently featured in the trending list.
examples: Marvel Tōkon: Fighting Souls - Amazing Guardians Trailer | PS5 & PC Games
GUILTY GEAR IS CHANGING - MAX REACTS: Strive 2.0 & Jam Trailer
gaming.insight: Gaming trailers and reaction videos are popular, indicating a strong interest in upcoming releases and updates in the gaming community. Channels can capitalize on this by providing in-depth analysis or reviews of new game releases.

entertainment_and_talk_shows.description: Entertainment content, including talk shows, also appears in the trending list.
entertainment_and_talk_shows.insight: Entertainment shows and discussions around cultural phenomena are trending. Content creators can explore talk shows or collaborative discussions on trending topics to capture audience interest.

TNT.description: TNT is leading with two trending videos, indicating strong content in sports broadcasting.

dominant_channels.insight: Channels with diverse content, especially those covering sports and gaming, have a higher potential to trend. Channels should consider diversifying their content to include both live events and entertainment.

emerging_interests.description: Audiences show interest in both live events and entertainment, with a particular focus on real-time coverage and gaming updates.
emerging_interests.opportunity: Develop content strategies that combine live coverage with in-depth commentary and analysis. Collaborate with influencers in the gaming and sports sectors to expand reach.

cross-category_content.description: Opportunities exist in blending categories, such as sports with entertainment or gaming with live reactions.
cross-category_content.opportunity: Create hybrid content that offers a unique perspective, such as athlete interviews in gaming contexts or interactive sports analyses.

focus_areas: Talk shows on trending cultural topics
content_creation.strategy: Leverage real-time events to create timely and relevant content. Utilize multi-platform strategies to engage both YouTube and streaming audiences.

collaboration.strategy: Engage with partners for co-hosted events or dual-content releases to maximize visibility and audience engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
